_doc: Tunable comp-selection criteria. Edit this file to retune WITHOUT touching code. Jurisdiction logic lives in src/screener/plugins/<jurisdiction>.py; this file only carries parameters. Every value here traces to a dated entry in DECISIONS.md.
_sf_band_doc: Gross-building-area band: a comp must fall within +/- this fraction of the subject's gross building area. LOCKED 0.50 (DECISIONS 2026-06-19), tunable in Phase 4.
_sf_required_doc: When true, only parcels with a reported gross building area enter the comp set, and the subject must have one too. Gross SF is part of the match (the +/-50% band), so this is true by default.
_class_match_level_doc: How granular the building-class match is. 'letter' = group by the building-class first letter / major use category (e.g. O1 comps against ALL O* office classes). 'exact' = match the full 2-char class (O1 only vs O1). PROPOSED DEFAULT: 'letter'.
_location_match_doc: Location granularity. 'borough_and_zip' = same borough AND same ZIP (implemented). 'borough_only' and 'zip_only' also supported. 'borough_and_neighborhood' is reserved but NOT yet available: the PLUTO neighborhood/CD field was not pulled in Phase 2, so neighborhood matching needs a re-pull before it can be selected.
_condo_doc: Condo unit lots are excluded from the comp set: their gross_sqft provenance is unreliable for $/SF (whole-building-envelope error, see DECISIONS derived-tier rejection). A parcel is treated as a condo unit lot if its building class starts with 'R' OR its lot number (BBL digits 7-10) >= condo_unit_lot_min. NOTE: these are NOT fully excluded upstream — many re-enter SF-eligibility via the roll gross_sqft fallback — so they must be excluded here at the comp layer.
_min_comp_count_doc: Below this, the screen refuses (DECISIONS LOCKED = 8). Carried here as a tunable for the refusal gate, which is NOT yet implemented.
_class_group_labels_doc: Human labels for the building-class first-letter groups (used in output, not in matching logic). Matching uses the letter itself; this map only names it.
